model

Class Controller

  • java.lang.Object
    • model.Controller

  • public class Controller
extends java.lang.Object
    Description: The Controller class manages a collection of Pokémon cards (Pokedex). It provides functionalities to add, manage, and retrieve cards in the collection.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Controller()
      Description: Initializes a new Controller with an empty Pokedex ArrayList.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean checkCardId(int id)
      Description: Checks if a card with the given ID already exists in the Pokedex.
      boolean checkIndex(int index)
      Description: Validates if an index is within the valid range of the Pokedex ArrayList.
      boolean checkRarity(java.lang.String myRarity)
      Description: Checks that the string myRarity is a valid Rarity.
      boolean checkType(java.lang.String myType)
      Description: Checks that the string myType is a valid Type.
      boolean deleteCard(int index)
      Description: Deletes a card from the Pokedex by setting it to null.
      java.lang.String getCardInformation(int index)
      Description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific card in the Pokedex.
      java.lang.String getPokedexInformation()
      Description: Retrieves formatted information about all cards in the Pokedex.
      void loadTestData()
      Description: Loads test data into the Pokedex for demonstration purposes.
      boolean modifyCard(int index, java.lang.String name, java.lang.String type, java.lang.String rarity, java.lang.String expansion, double price)
      Description: Modifies the information of an existing card in the Pokedex.
      boolean registerCard(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String type, java.lang.String rarity, java.lang.String expansion, int id, double price)
      Description: Registers a new Pokémon card in the Pokedex.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Controller

        public Controller()
        Description: Initializes a new Controller with an empty Pokedex ArrayList. Also loads test data into the Pokedex. Postcondition: The pokedex ArrayList is initialized and populated with test data.

    • Method Detail

      • loadTestData

        public void loadTestData()
        Description: Loads test data into the Pokedex for demonstration purposes. Registers three test cards with predefined information. Precondition: The pokedex ArrayList must be initialized. Postcondition: Three test cards are added (if possible) to the Pokedex.

      • registerCard

        public boolean registerCard(java.lang.String name,
                            java.lang.String type,
                            java.lang.String rarity,
                            java.lang.String expansion,
                            int id,
                            double price)
        Description: Registers a new Pokémon card in the Pokedex. Creates a Card object with the provided details and adds it to the first available Precondition: The pokedex ArrayList must be initialized. Postcondition: If available null position is found, a new Card object is added to to the pokedex.
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the Pokémon card
        type - the type of the Pokémon (e.g., Fire, Water, Grass)
        rarity - the rarity level of the card
        expansion - the expansion set the card belongs to
        id - the unique identifier of the card
        price - the price of the card
        Returns:
        true if the card is successfully registered, false if the Pokedex is full

      • checkType

        public boolean checkType(java.lang.String myType)
        Description: Checks that the string myType is a valid Type.
        Parameters:
        myType - the type of the Pokémon (e.g., Fire, Water, Grass)
        Returns:
        true if myType is a valid Type, false if not.

      • checkRarity

        public boolean checkRarity(java.lang.String myRarity)
        Description: Checks that the string myRarity is a valid Rarity.
        Parameters:
        myRarity - the rarity of the Pokémon (e.g., Normal, Rare)
        Returns:
        true if myRarity is a valid Rarity, false if not.

      • checkCardId

        public boolean checkCardId(int id)
        Description: Checks if a card with the given ID already exists in the Pokedex. Prevents duplicate card IDs from being registered. Precondition: the pokedex ArrayList must be initialized.
        Parameters:
        id - the ID to check for uniqueness
        Returns:
        true if the ID is unique and not in use, false if it already exists

      • getPokedexInformation

        public java.lang.String getPokedexInformation()
        Description: Retrieves formatted information about all cards in the Pokedex. Lists each registered card with its position number and name, separated by newlines. Only non-null cards are included in the output. Precondition: the pokedex ArrayList must be initialized.
        Returns:
        a String containing the formatted list of all cards in the Pokedex, or an empty string if no cards are registered

      • getCardInformation

        public java.lang.String getCardInformation(int index)
        Description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific card in the Pokedex. Precondition: pokedex ArrayList must be initialized.
        Parameters:
        index - the position of the card in the Pokedex ArrayList (0-based indexing)
        Returns:
        a String containing the card's detailed information, or null if not implemented or if the index is out of bounds

      • checkIndex

        public boolean checkIndex(int index)
        Description: Validates if an index is within the valid range of the Pokedex ArrayList. Precondition: the pokedex ArrayList must be initialized.
        Parameters:
        index - the index to validate
        Returns:
        true if the index is within the valid range (0 to MAX_CARDS-1), false otherwise

      • modifyCard

        public boolean modifyCard(int index,
                          java.lang.String name,
                          java.lang.String type,
                          java.lang.String rarity,
                          java.lang.String expansion,
                          double price)
        Description: Modifies the information of an existing card in the Pokedex. Updates the card's name, type, rarity, expansion, and price. Precondition: pokedex ArrayList must be initialized. Precondition: index must be valid and within bounds. Postcondition: If the card exists at the given index, its information is updated.
        Parameters:
        index - the position of the card to modify (0-based indexing)
        name - the new name for the card
        type - the new type for the card
        rarity - the new rarity level for the card
        expansion - the new expansion set for the card
        price - the new price for the card
        Returns:
        true if the card is successfully modified, false if the index is invalid or card doesn't exist

      • deleteCard

        public boolean deleteCard(int index)
        Description: Deletes a card from the Pokedex by setting it to null. The card at the specified index is removed from the collection. Precondition: the pokedex ArrayList must be initialized. Precondition: index must be valid and within bounds. Postcondition: If a card exists at the given index, it is removed (set to null).
        Parameters:
        index - the position of the card to delete (0-based indexing)
        Returns:
        true if the card is successfully deleted, false if the index is invalid or no card exists at that position
